item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Yeah, this is Keter. It's uncontained, gigantic, and has an unprecdictable travel pattern.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: sorry i failed to entertain you, bud. maybe i'll catch you on the next one

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I like the central premise and the bizarre behaviour of the anomaly, with the exception of the teleportation. It feels tacked-on, particularly because the implications of it being able to travel anywhere on Earth with no travel time are just brushed over. It later being shown that there may be more of these things doesn't help in this regard.

My other main issue are the radio transmissions. To be frank, I'm unfortunately no longer entertained by what I perceive to be gobbledygook intended to be spooky. Without any kind of context, I just feel confused (what's with all the talk about a mother?). It feels like several steps have been skipped in the lead-up to the transmissions, and that weakens it for me. Maybe I'm just too simple.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: By 2020, the only contributors will be Roget and TheGreatSea.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
my justification was: it kills only about 7 people a year, and you can make it go away with a single cruise missile. this thing can't do mass destruction, and it isn't gonna be causing any K-class scenarios.

and me and peppers really did try damn hard to make that image look convincing, but i've never done image editing before and pep could only work with what he was given. i'm sorry that knocked you out so much that you couldn't enjoy it.

maybe next time, friend

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: You're a goddamn machine, man. By 2019, 80% of all new wiki content will be your contributions, and the other 20% will be, like, fanart of your work or something. Keep 'em coming.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I can see the corkboard and red yarn already. There's so much going on, and in so many ways.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I seconding the suggestion of this being Keter, though this was a fun and intriguing read regardless. I'm looking forward to seeing what you do with this mythos you are developing!

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The image is killing it for me. Something that big, that just floats around and teleports, there's no way it's not Keter. Plus the image itself feels fake because I've seen that fog effect in creepypastas before.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I love this giant flying ball of corpses. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
all these human corpses, maybe a mythos?

Inb4 this is all related to SCP-\̅\̅\̅\̅-J in some way.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
i feel like youre trying to start something with all these human corpses, maybe a mythos? +1 either way

EDIT: Wait… Mother Horse Eyes, issat you?

item.title: oh man oh man oh jeez
item.content:encoded:
i release upon the world my sixth item.

+image credit
- Close

original located here, edited by myself and PeppersGhost.

thanks to everyone in the chat that helped me elevate this from dirty and awful to slightly less dirty and awful. you know who you are.

and thank you, reader, for sticking around. ♥

she is watching you
